name: cognitive-adaptation
description: Injects a cognitive-adaptation router context before each prompt.

interface.shortDescription: Adds a router context so the model can self-select cognitive adaptation.
interface.longDescription: On UserPromptSubmit, prints a short additionalContext router. If the current task is explanation, research, teaching, code walkthrough, review explanation, or debug explanation, the model should use the bundled cognitive-adaptation skill; otherwise it should ignore the router.
defaultPrompt: 调研一下这个概念是什么，并讲清楚。
